name: Pierre Franey's Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potatoes in a saucepan and add cold water to cover and salt.
2. Bring to a boil and cook until tender, 20 to 30 minutes.
3. Drain and peel the potatoes.
4. Process through a food mill or potato ricer.
5. In a mixing bowl, combine mashed potatoes, butter, half-and-half, eggs, flour, onion, garlic, parsley, salt, and pepper.
6. Blend well.
7. Heat oil in a skillet, preferably nonstick.
8. Spoon the mixture into mounds and flatten to form patty shapes.
9. Cook 3 to 4 minutes on one side until golden brown.
10. Turn and cook 3-4 minutes on the second side until golden brown.
11. Do not overcook; pancakes will be dry if cooked too long.
12. Serve hot.
